response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio phonetically matches the reference lyrics of both 'Tsumi to Batsu' and 'Ashura-chan' very closely, with some minor differences. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics reference for both songs but updated '誰それとお手元の世界に夢中' to the correct lyric '誰そ彼 お手元の世界に夢中' as sung in 'Ashura-chan', and discarded unused silent frames. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely anchored to the exact milliseconds of vocal activation. Applied instantaneous transitions and truncation during fast-paced segments in 'Ashura-chan' to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 破るドイツ車と
パトカー
サイレン
爆音
現実界
或る浮遊
不穏な悲鳴を愛さないで
未来等見ないで
subtitles.english: don't look at the future or anything,

subtitles.original: 確信出来る現在だけ
subtitles.english: layer only the present I can be certain of,

subtitles.original: 重ねて
あたしの名前をちゃんと呼んで
身体を触って
必要なのは是だけ
認めて
不穏な悲鳴を愛さないで
確信出来る現在だけ
subtitles.english: Layer only the present I can be certain of,

subtitles.original: 重ねて
あたしの名前をちゃんと呼んで
身体を触って
必要なのは是だけ
認めて
頬を刺す朝の山手通り
subtitles.english: The morning Yamate Street that stabs my cheeks,

subtitles.original: 烟草の空き箱を捨てる
subtitles.english: throwing away an empty cigarette box.

subtitles.original: 今日もまた足の踏み場は無い
subtitles.english: Again today there is no room for my feet,

subtitles.original: 小部屋が孤独を甘やかす
subtitles.english: a small room indulges in solitude...

subtitles.original: ねえ あんた答えてよ
誰そ彼 お手元の世界に夢中
subtitles.english: Someone is absorbed in the world in their hands,

subtitles.original: 化け物の飼い方を学んでる
subtitles.english: learning how to keep a monster.

subtitles.original: 選ばれる為なら舌を売る
subtitles.english: Selling their tongue if it means being chosen,

subtitles.original: 裏切られた分だけ墓を掘る
subtitles.english: digging a grave only as much as they've been betrayed.

subtitles.original: へらへらのおつむがどうにかして
うすら寒い言葉ばかりになる
subtitles.english: and it all turns into chilling words.

subtitles.original: 覚えない顔とバイバイできるなら
subtitles.english: If I could say bye-bye to faces I don't remember,

subtitles.original: 阿修羅にだってなれるわ保存
subtitles.english: I could even become an Ashura!

subtitles.original: 逃げるえすけいぷえすけいぷえすけいぷ 仏のまま
subtitles.english: Running, escape escape escape, as Buddha is,

subtitles.original: 飛べるすてっぷすてっぷすてっぷ 仰せのまま
subtitles.english: flying, step step step, as ordered.

subtitles.original: アンダスタン アンダスタン
どーどー閻魔様さえ喰らって
subtitles.english: Whoa there, even devouring Enma the King of Hell!

subtitles.original: 騙るすにーくすにーくすにーく 嵐の中
subtitles.english: Sneaking, sneak sneak sneak, in the storm,

subtitles.original: 跳ねるすきっぷすきっぷすきっぷ あっそ、へのかっぱ
subtitles.english: skipping, skip skip skip, oh well, piece of cake.

subtitles.original: アンダスタン アンダスタン
いっそ骨の髄までしゃぶって
subtitles.english: Just go ahead and suck until the marrow of the bone!

subtitles.original: ねえ あんた答えてよ保存
日々の滲みを木々に焼べて暖をとり合う
subtitles.english: We burn our daily stains like firewood to warm each other,
